title: BlastStats
description: A client side mod that let you count end crystal explotions
body:
# Blast Stats

**Blast Stats** is a Minecraft client-side mod that tracks and displays the number of end crystal explosions triggered by the player.

## Features

- On-screen counter for end crystal explosions
- Timer with customizable duration
- Keybind to start/stop counting
- Real-time stats: total explosions and explosions per second
- In-game command to set timer:  
  `/set blaststats_timer <seconds>`
- Simple and intuitive HUD overlay

Designed for players who want to analyze or improve their crystal PvP performance.
